blended.narrative: Mont Blanc is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 6,267 ft. Looking ahead, 21 inches possible over the next 14 days. Mild temps with highs near 47°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Wednesday: 11" of heavy snow, highs of 36°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Saturday: 4" of snow, highs of 30°F. Expect variable conditions.
Monday: 2.1" of snow, highs of 24°F. Expect powder.
